title: 1.1.1.1 Ensure cramfs kernel module is not available (Automated)
remediation: Edit or create a file in `/etc/modprobe.d/` ending in `.conf` and add `install cramfs /bin/false`.
description: The cramfs filesystem type is not commonly used and should be disabled.
impact: Disabling uncommon filesystems reduces the kernel attack surface.

wazuh_sca.title: 1.1.1.1 Ensure cramfs kernel module is not available (Automated)
wazuh_sca.rationale: Disabling uncommon filesystems reduces the kernel attack surface.
wazuh_sca.remediation: Edit or create a file in `/etc/modprobe.d/` ending in `.conf` and add `install cramfs /bin/false`.
wazuh_sca.description: The cramfs filesystem type is not commonly used and should be disabled.

title: 5.1.20 Ensure X11 forwarding is disabled (Automated)
remediation: Set `X11Forwarding no` in sshd configuration and restart SSH.
description: The SSH daemon should not permit X11 forwarding.
impact: X11 forwarding expands the SSH session attack surface.

wazuh_sca.title: 5.1.20 Ensure X11 forwarding is disabled (Automated)
wazuh_sca.rationale: X11 forwarding expands the SSH session attack surface.
wazuh_sca.remediation: Set `X11Forwarding no` in sshd configuration and restart SSH.
wazuh_sca.description: The SSH daemon should not permit X11 forwarding.

title: 6.2.1.3 Ensure auditd is installed (Automated)
description: auditd should be installed to collect audit events.
impact: Without auditd, audit event collection is incomplete.

wazuh_sca.title: 6.2.1.3 Ensure auditd is installed (Automated)
wazuh_sca.rationale: Without auditd, audit event collection is incomplete.
wazuh_sca.description: auditd should be installed to collect audit events.

title: Sudo chroot option local privilege escalation
remediation: Update sudo to the fixed Ubuntu 24.04 package version or later.
